description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, build, and deploy, and define the variables DOCS_BUILD_DIR=DOCS_BUILD, PAGES_DIR=public, and TESTS_DIR=tests. Add a test job that runs `cd $TESTS_DIR && make` in the test stage. Add a build job named docs that runs in the build stage, executes `apt-get -qq update` and `apt-get -qq -y install pandoc` in before_script, then runs `make docs DOCS_BUILD_DIR=$DOCS_BUILD_DIR`; it stores the generated `$DOCS_BUILD_DIR/*.html` files as artifacts that expire in 1 week. Add a deploy job named pages that runs in the deploy stage, depends on docs, runs only on the master branch, and executes `rm -rf $PAGES_DIR`, `mkdir -p $PAGES_DIR`, and `mv $DOCS_BUILD_DIR/* $PAGES_DIR`; it publishes the `$PAGES_DIR/` directory as the pages artifact.
